mnemonics.title: Walk Freely, Trail Edges, Path Vertices
mnemonics.content: Use the acronym W-T-P to remember the restrictions: A Walk has no restrictions. A Trail forbids repeating Edges. A Path forbids repeating Vertices. Think 'Wide', 'Tight on Edges', 'Perfect on Vertices'.

mnemonics.title: Circuit is a Closed Trail
mnemonics.content: Remember that a Circuit is like an electrical circuit—it loops back to the start, and you can't use the same wire (edge) twice.
